description_long: This is a large, round wall clock with a wooden body and a barrel-like rim, giving it a rustic and robust appearance. The face of the clock features bold black Roman numerals and a set of two black hands, one for the hour and one for the minute, both mounted on a central axis. The wood grain is clearly visible, adding a natural texture and warmth to the design, while the numerals and hands provide a striking contrast. The side view reveals a thick, drum-shaped profile with a wide black band running vertically, likely for structural or decorative purposes. The clock face is bordered by a slightly raised rim, enhancing its dimensionality and presence. This clock is designed to be mounted on a wall and would serve as a prominent timepiece in a public or communal urban setting.
description: A large, round wooden wall clock with bold black Roman numerals and hands, featuring a thick, barrel-like rim and a prominent black vertical band on the side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden clock face with black Roman numerals and two black hands, hour and minute, clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the clock's thick, drum-like body and a wide black vertical band running along its edge.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view of the clock face, showing only the hour hand and the same Roman numeral layout, with wood grain visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the thick wooden rim and the black vertical band.
attribute_face_design: Round wooden face with black Roman numerals, central dot markers, and two black hands, bordered by a raised rim.
